prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files across the repos in this ecosystem that contain an explicit interface compliance check for `storage.Interface` using the Go pattern `var _ storage.Interface = (*StructName)(nil)`. For each match, report the repo, file path, and the struct name that implements the interface.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files across the repos in this ecosystem that contain an explicit interface compliance check for `storage.Interface` using the Go pattern `var _ storage.Interface = (*StructName)(nil)`. For each match, report the repo, file path, and the struct name that implements the interface.
